---
title: "Digital Delivery"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: article
    output-file: 02-digital_delivery.html
  revealjs:
    output-file: 02-digital_delivery.revealjs.html
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
editor: visual
---

# Agile! {background="#43464B"}
